Event: Snowbound Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 19/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI294
Winter Shroud Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals physical damage equal to 150% of their attack to all enemy units, and has a 40% chance to petrify each of the affected units for 4 sec. For the duration, the target unit is unable to move, and takes 35% more damage. If an enemy unit was already petrified when the ability activated, they additionally receive 500000 pure damage.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
